'''鈭歬-r-zh''' ('''kakarazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imbring|imbring]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-r-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imbring|imbring]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-r-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kakarazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikarazh|thikarazh]] || [[word:jikarazh|jikarazh]] || [[word:shikarazh|shikarazh]] || [[word:kikarazh|kikarazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukarazh|thuthukarazh]] || [[word:jujukarazh|jujukarazh]] || [[word:shushukarazh|shushukarazh]] || [[word:kukukarazh|kukukarazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukarazh|thukarazh]] || [[word:jukarazh|jukarazh]] || [[word:shukarazh|shukarazh]] || [[word:kukarazh|kukarazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukarazh|thukarazh]] || [[word:jukarazh|jukarazh]] || [[word:shukarazh|shukarazh]] || [[word:kukarazh|kukarazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekarazh|thekarazh]] || [[word:jekarazh|jekarazh]] || [[word:shekarazh|shekarazh]] || [[word:kekarazh|kekarazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokarazh|thothokarazh]] || [[word:jojokarazh|jojokarazh]] || [[word:shoshokarazh|shoshokarazh]] || [[word:kokokarazh|kokokarazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokarazh|thokarazh]] || [[word:jokarazh|jokarazh]] || [[word:shokarazh|shokarazh]] || [[word:kokarazh|kokarazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokarazh|thokarazh]] || [[word:jokarazh|jokarazh]] || [[word:shokarazh|shokarazh]] || [[word:kokarazh|kokarazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙karazh|th忙karazh]] || [[word:j忙karazh|j忙karazh]] || [[word:sh忙karazh|sh忙karazh]] || [[word:k忙karazh|k忙karazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakarazh|thathakarazh]] || [[word:jajakarazh|jajakarazh]] || [[word:shashakarazh|shashakarazh]] || [[word:kakakarazh|kakakarazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakarazh|thakarazh]] || [[word:jakarazh|jakarazh]] || [[word:shakarazh|shakarazh]] || [[word:kakarazh|kakarazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakarazh|thakarazh]] || [[word:jakarazh|jakarazh]] || [[word:shakarazh|shakarazh]] || [[word:kakarazh|kakarazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakarazh|shakarazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakarazh|goshakarazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakarazh|gokishakarazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakarazhn眉|shakarazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakarazhnkn眉|goshakarazhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakarazhn眉|gokishakarazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakarazhsh毛|shakarazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakarazhnksh毛|goshakarazhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakarazhsh毛|gokishakarazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakarazhro|shakarazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakarazhnkro|goshakarazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakarazhro|gokishakarazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakarazhmu|shakarazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakarazhnkmu|goshakarazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakarazhmu|gokishakarazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakarazhsher|shakarazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakarazhnksher|goshakarazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakarazhsher|gokishakarazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakarazhng|shakarazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakarazhnkng|goshakarazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakarazhng|gokishakarazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakarazhya|shakarazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakarazhnkya|goshakarazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakarazhya|gokishakarazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakarazhyam|shakarazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakarazhnkyam|goshakarazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakarazhyam|gokishakarazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakarazhn眉sh毛|shakarazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakarazhnkn眉sh毛|goshakarazhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakarazhn眉sh毛|gokishakarazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakarazhn眉ro|shakarazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakarazhnkn眉ro|goshakarazhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakarazhn眉ro|gokishakarazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakarazhn眉mu|shakarazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakarazhnkn眉mu|goshakarazhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakarazhn眉mu|gokishakarazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakarazhsh毛n眉|shakarazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakarazhnksh毛n眉|goshakarazhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakarazhsh毛n眉|gokishakarazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakarazhsh毛ro|shakarazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakarazhnksh毛ro|goshakarazhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakarazhsh毛ro|gokishakarazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakarazhsh毛mu|shakarazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakarazhnksh毛mu|goshakarazhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakarazhsh毛mu|gokishakarazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakarazhron眉|shakarazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakarazhnkron眉|goshakarazhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakarazhron眉|gokishakarazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakarazhrosh毛|shakarazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakarazhnkrosh毛|goshakarazhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakarazhrosh毛|gokishakarazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakarazhromu|shakarazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakarazhnkromu|goshakarazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakarazhromu|gokishakarazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakarazhmun眉|shakarazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakarazhnkmun眉|goshakarazhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakarazhmun眉|gokishakarazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakarazhmush毛|shakarazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakarazhnkmush毛|goshakarazhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakarazhmush毛|gokishakarazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakarazhmuro|shakarazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakarazhnkmuro|goshakarazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakarazhmuro|gokishakarazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
